🎯 MISSIONS
STORY · TUTORIAL
📖 Prologue
NOTHING DIFFICULTY
Prologue to the main story. Move around your base and learn the basic mechanics of the game. Plunger Man is an elite officer, he will teach you everything you need.
✔ ВЫБРАНО
⚔️ War Beginnings
MAIN STORY · 10 WAVES
10 waves of chaos... Your mission is to defend the core — toilets need to destroy it. This core creates a dome over your base; as long as it's active your base is safe. Protect it at all costs. After some time, Speaker Men will come to help. Go to the forest — there is an enemy base, and from it, Skibidi Toilets are already attacking your core.
✔ ВЫБРАНО
🌲 Setting up camp and hiking in the footsteps of G Toilet
STORY · 5 WAVES
We have disbanded the camp in the forest. Follow the footsteps of the G Toilet to reach their base. No core — only your survival. 2 lives. A helicopter supply drop arrives every 2 waves.
🚧

⌨️ Клавиши (ПК управление)
💻 ПК управление
WASD — движение  |  Мышь — поворот камеры

Q — джетпак  |  F — бластер
При телепорте: навести курсор и нажать ЛКМ
